What buyers need to know

01

Palm enquiry checklist

Include variety, required height, quantity, delivery city and whether installation is required.

  • Variety
  • Height and quantity
  • City and site access
02

Date-product checklist

Include product format, retail or wholesale status, quantity, packaging requirement and destination.

  • Product and volume
  • Pack format
  • Destination and timing
03

Response quality

Clear inputs reduce repeated questions and make the first quotation materially more useful.

  • One structured message
  • Faster qualification
  • Fewer surprises
